title: BetterF5
description: A simple mod that makes third person perspective even better for vehicles.
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BetterF5/BH_NU_HEADER.webp)


![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BetterF5/BH_NU_BANNER2.webp)

### A simple mod that makes third person perspective even better for vehicles.

What does it do?
- Auto toggles third person when entering/exiting a vehicle
- When in third person, you can scroll to slightly zoom in or out.

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BetterF5/BH_NU_BANNER3.webp)](https://discord.com/invite/g5a7ZA62t3)
  
[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BetterF5/BH_NU_PROMO.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/additionalservers)
